description: Shared Renovate preset for all Sebastian Software repositories.

packageRules.description: Release-relevant dependency updates use fix(deps) so release-please publishes deployable application images after merged dependency PRs. This intentionally covers runtime packages plus build, CI, package-manager, Node, Dockerfile and lockfile-affecting updates; purely mechanical standards rollouts live in standards.json and keep their separate chore: standards flow.
Internal scopes — trusted first-party publishers; the npm release-age cooldown would only delay our own releases without a security benefit.
Automerge our own packages once CI is green — releases roll out org-wide without manual review.
Group the OXC toolchain (oxlint, oxfmt and native bindings) into a single PR.

Group all @palamedes/* packages into a single PR — they are released in lockstep and bind to a module-singleton runtime, so a partial bump (e.g. @palamedes/react without @palamedes/runtime) duplicates the runtime instance and breaks SSR with 'No active server i18n instance'.
Automerge non-major devDependency updates once CI is green.
